hooks.command:
cd /Users/jb/Desktop/gtd-app && b=$(awk '/^## Build Backlog/{f=1} f' PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE.md) && c=$(git log -5 --pretty=format:'- %h %s' 2>/dev/null) && jq -n --arg b "$b" --arg c "$c" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:("Project context (auto-loaded from PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE.md):

"+$b+"

## Recent commits
"+$c+"

---
At the start of this session, give a brief 3-5 line summary of the backlog (top P0/P1 items + most recent shipped work).")}}'
